user.description: Enter the FCM credentials JSON string from the Rust+ companion browser extension.

confirm_discovery.title: Add Rust Server
confirm_discovery.description: A new Rust server '{name}' was paired via the Rust+ app. Do you want to add it to Home Assistant?

init.description: Add discovered devices using the format 'ENTITY_ID:NAME', separated by commas. (e.g. '12345:Main Switch, 67890:Lights')

device_paired.title: Rust+ Device Paired: {name}
device_paired.description: A new {type} ({name}, ID: {id}) was paired via the Rust+ app. You can now add it to your configuration if desired using the integration's Options flow.

rename_device.title: Action Required: Rename {name}
rename_device.description:
You successfully paired the {type} **{name}** (ID: {id}).

By default, Facepunch only provides generic names like 'Smart Alarm' during pairing.

**Please go to your Home Assistant Devices dashboard, click on this newly paired entity, and rename it to a friendly name (like 'Front Door Alarm') so you can easily identify it!**
